summary: Backend: 4/4 pytest tests PASS (health + OCR happy path with synthetic timetable image extracting rows[] with HH:MM prayer times + OCR error handling for missing body & non-table image). Frontend: All Home/Alarms/Timetable/Settings tabs render, empty states show, all requested testIDs present (empty-upload-btn, pick-camera-btn, pick-gallery-btn, setting-24h, setting-theme-*, setting-sunrise, setting-asr-*, backup-btn, restore-btn, settings-toast), dark theme applies visually, 24h toggle changes clock from '5:30 PM' to '17:31', backup toast shows 'Backup saved on this device', restore toast shows 'Backup restored'.

ui_bugs.issue: flash() uses setTimeout(2000) but never stores/clears the previous timeout. If user taps Backup and then Restore within 2s, the leftover backup timeout fires and clears the Restore toast prematurely. Fix: store the setTimeout id in a ref and clearTimeout before starting a new one.

action_items: (Optional / LOW) In /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/settings.tsx patch flash() to clear the previous setTimeout so back-to-back toasts (backup then restore) both remain visible for their full 2s.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py hard-codes model 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview' - acceptable but consider env override.
OCR endpoint stores every parsed timetable to Mongo (db.timetables) with no cleanup - fine for MVP.
flash() timeout leak in settings.tsx (see ui_bugs).
seed_data_creation: Generated in-memory synthetic prayer timetable JPEG (base64) via /app/backend/tests/gen_timetable_image.py - not persisted; each pytest run recreates it. One document per run is inserted into MongoDB db.timetables by the OCR endpoint (no cleanup needed for MVP).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL) in /app/frontend/.env. Public URL: https://salah-alarm-6.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend OCR endpoint /api/ocr/timetable returns 200 on synthetic JPEG timetable within ~15s. Emergent LLM key rate-limits parallel calls - keep pytest sequential (no xdist). All required testIDs are present and working.
rca_of_issue: Minor: settings toast disappears too early on rapid Backup->Restore because flash() setTimeout is not cleared between calls. Reproduce: open Settings, tap Backup, within 2s tap Restore -> Restore toast vanishes at t=2000ms from the leftover backup timeout instead of t=restore+2000ms. Mitigation: store ref of setTimeout id, clearTimeout on each new flash().
